import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, PatternFill, Border, Side

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('planning.xlsx'\)
ws = wb['Businesss Model']

# Keep rows 1-5 \(header info\), clear row 6 onwards
for row in range\(6, ws.max_row + 1\):
    for col in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
        ws.cell\(row=row, column=col\).value = None

# Styling
header_font = Font\(bold=True, size=12\)
section_font = Font\(bold=True, size=11, color='FFFFFF'\)
section_fill = PatternFill\(start_color='2F5496', end_color='2F5496', fill_type='solid'\)
subsection_font = Font\(bold=True, size=10\)
subsection_fill = PatternFill\(start_color='D6E4F0', end_color='D6E4F0', fill_type='solid'\)
available_font = Font\(color='006100'\)
available_fill = PatternFill\(start_color='C6EFCE', end_color='C6EFCE', fill_type='solid'\)
thin_border = Border\(
    left=Side\(style='thin'\),
    right=Side\(style='thin'\),
    top=Side\(style='thin'\),
    bottom=Side\(style='thin'\)
\)

# Add Status column header
ws.cell\(row=5, column=4, value='Status'\)
ws.cell\(row=5, column=4\).font = header_font

# Features data: \(feature, page, details, status\)
features = [
    # Section: Gym Owners
    \('SECTION', 'For Gym Owners:', '', '', ''\),

    # Auth & Onboarding
    \('SUB', 'Authentication & Onboarding', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Gym owner registration', '/register', 'Email/password signup with Supabase Auth', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Gym owner login', '/login', 'Email/password login', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Password reset', '/reset-password', 'Email-based password reset flow', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Onboarding wizard', '/onboarding', 'Step-by-step gym setup after registration', 'Available'\),

    # Dashboard
    \('SUB', 'Dashboard', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Dashboard overview', '/dashboard', 'Main dashboard with stats, recent activity, quick actions', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Analytics dashboard', '/dashboard/analytics', 'Check-in trends, member growth, peak hours, device breakdown, top members', 'Available'\),

    # Gym Management
    \('SUB', 'Gym Management', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Create gym', '/gyms/new', 'Create new gym with address, contact, settings', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'View all gyms', '/gyms', 'List all owned gyms', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Gym details & edit', '/gyms/[id]', 'View and update gym information', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Delete gym', '/gyms/[id]', 'Remove a gym', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Gym settings', '/dashboard/settings', 'Timezone, currency, geofence radius configuration', 'Available'\),

    # Member Management
    \('SUB', 'Member Management', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'View members list', '/dashboard/members', 'List all members with filtering by status', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Add new member', '/dashboard/members/new', 'Create member with profile, tier, subscription plan', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Member detail view', '/dashboard/members/[id]', 'View member info, check-in history, payments, stats', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Edit member', '/dashboard/members/[id]', 'Update member profile, status, tier, notes', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Member status tracking', '/dashboard/members', 'Active, expired, suspended, cancelled, pending, trial statuses', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Membership tiers', '/dashboard/members', '1/3/6/12 month and custom subscription plans', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Blacklist member', '/dashboard/members/[id]', 'Blacklist/unblacklist members with reason', 'Available'\),

    # QR Code Management
    \('SUB', 'QR Code Management', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Create QR code', '/dashboard/qr-codes/new', 'Generate QR codes with customization \(color, logo, frame\)', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'View QR codes', '/dashboard/qr-codes', 'List all QR codes', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'QR code details', '/dashboard/qr-codes/[id]', 'View scan analytics, edit, delete QR codes', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'QR code types', '/dashboard/qr-codes/new', 'Check-in, equipment, class, promotion, custom types', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Scan limiting & expiration', '/dashboard/qr-codes', 'Set max scans and expiry dates', 'Available'\),

    # Payment Management
    \('SUB', 'Payment Management', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'View payments', '/dashboard/payments', 'List all payments with filtering', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Record payment', '/dashboard/payments', 'Add subscription, one-time, penalty, refund payments', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Payment status tracking', '/dashboard/payments', 'Completed, pending, failed, refunded statuses', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Payment methods', '/dashboard/payments', 'Save and manage payment methods', 'Available'\),

    # Staff & Expenses
    \('SUB', 'Staff & Expense Management', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Staff management', '/dashboard/staff-expenses', 'Add/edit/delete staff with role, salary, contact info', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Expense tracking', '/dashboard/staff-expenses', 'Track expenses by category, amount, recurring support', 'Available'\),

    # Team & Roles
    \('SUB', 'Team & Role Management', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Team management', '/dashboard/team', 'View and manage team members', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Invite team members', '/dashboard/team', 'Invite users to gym roles', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Role-based access', '/dashboard/team', 'Owner, co-owner, trainer, receptionist, viewer roles', 'Available'\),

    # Announcements
    \('SUB', 'Announcements', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Create announcement', '/dashboard/announcements', 'Post info, warning, emergency, holiday, closure announcements', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Schedule announcements', '/dashboard/announcements', 'Set start/end dates, notify members', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Manage announcements', '/dashboard/announcements', 'Edit, delete, track active announcements', 'Available'\),

    # Referrals
    \('SUB', 'Referral Program', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Referral tracking', '/dashboard/referrals', 'Track referrer/referred members, status, bonuses', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Apply referral bonuses', '/dashboard/referrals', 'Configure and apply bonus type and value', 'Available'\),

    # Notifications
    \('SUB', 'Notifications', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Subscription expiry alerts', 'Header dropdown', 'T-3, T-0, T+1, T+3 day notifications', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Blacklist alerts', 'Header dropdown', 'Alert when blacklisted member scans QR', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Read/unread tracking', 'Header dropdown', 'Mark as read, unread count badge', 'Available'\),

    # Reviews
    \('SUB', 'Reviews & Feedback', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'View gym reviews', '/dashboard', 'See member reviews \(1-5 star\)', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Feedback requests', '/dashboard', 'Send targeted feedback requests to inactive members', 'Available'\),

    # Section: Member Portal
    \('SECTION', 'For Gym Members \(Portal\):', '', '', ''\),

    # Portal Auth
    \('SUB', 'Portal Access', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'PIN authentication', '/[slug]/portal/sign-in', 'PIN-based login with email delivery', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Quick check-in \(QR\)', '/[slug]/portal/quick-check-in', 'QR code scanning for instant check-in', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Check-in success page', '/[slug]/portal/check-in-success', 'Confirmation after check-in', 'Available'\),

    # Portal Dashboard
    \('SUB', 'Member Dashboard', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Dashboard overview', '/[slug]/portal/dashboard', 'Activity overview, announcements, stats, quick actions', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'View announcements', '/[slug]/portal/dashboard', 'See active gym announcements', 'Available'\),

    # Check-ins
    \('SUB', 'Check-In Management', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Check-in history', '/[slug]/portal/check-ins', 'Table view of all check-ins', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Check-in calendar', '/[slug]/portal/check-ins', 'Calendar visualization of check-ins', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Duration tracking', '/[slug]/portal/check-ins', 'Track check-in/out timing and duration', 'Available'\),

    # Workouts
    \('SUB', 'Workout Tracking', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'View workout routines', '/[slug]/portal/workouts', 'List all saved routines', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Create workout routine', '/[slug]/portal/workouts/new', 'Build routines from exercise library', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Routine details', '/[slug]/portal/workouts/[id]', 'View exercises in a routine', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Start workout session', '/[slug]/portal/workouts/[id]/start', 'Begin active session from routine', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Active session tracker', '/[slug]/portal/sessions/active', 'Timer, exercise logging, set tracking', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Session history', '/[slug]/portal/sessions', 'View all completed sessions', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Session details', '/[slug]/portal/sessions/[id]', 'Review individual session data', 'Available'\),

    # Diet
    \('SUB', 'Diet & Nutrition', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'View diet plans', '/[slug]/portal/diet', 'List all nutrition plans', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Diet plan details', '/[slug]/portal/diet/[planId]', 'View plan with calorie/macro targets', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Meal management', '/[slug]/portal/diet/[planId]/meals', 'Breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack tracking', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Meal completion tracking', '/[slug]/portal/diet', 'Mark meals as completed', 'Available'\),

    # Personal Records
    \('SUB', 'Personal Records', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'PR tracker', '/[slug]/portal/personal-records', 'Log and view personal records per exercise', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'PR progress', '/[slug]/portal/personal-records', 'Track weight/reps history and progress', 'Available'\),

    # Member Referrals
    \('SUB', 'Member Referrals', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Referral tracker', '/[slug]/portal/referrals', 'View referral status and rewards', 'Available'\),

    # Reviews & Feedback
    \('SUB', 'Reviews & Feedback', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Submit gym review', '/[slug]/portal/review', '1-5 star rating, public/private option', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Respond to feedback', '/[slug]/portal/feedback', 'Answer targeted feedback requests', 'Available'\),

    # Member Payments
    \('SUB', 'Payment History', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'View payment history', '/[slug]/portal/payments', 'See all payment records', 'Available'\),

    # Member Settings
    \('SUB', 'Settings', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Member settings', '/[slug]/portal/settings', 'Profile and preferences', 'Available'\),

    # Section: Public Pages
    \('SECTION', 'Public Pages:', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Landing page', '/', 'Main marketing page with animations', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Gym-specific landing', '/[slug]', 'Public gym page for member onboarding', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Terms of service', '/terms', 'Legal terms page', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Privacy policy', '/privacy', 'Privacy policy page', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Contact form', '/', 'Contact/demo request submission', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'QR expired page', '/qr-expired', 'Error page for expired QR codes', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'QR limit reached page', '/qr-limit-reached', 'Error page for scan limit exceeded', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'QR not found page', '/qr-not-found', 'Error page for invalid QR codes', 'Available'\),

    # Section: Email Notifications
    \('SECTION', 'Email Notifications:', '', '', ''\),
    \('', 'Welcome email', 'Email', 'Sent on member registration', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Check-in confirmation', 'Email', 'Sent after successful check-in', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'PIN authentication code', 'Email', 'Sent for portal login', 'Available'\),
    \('', 'Inactive member check-in alert', 'Email', 'Notifies owner of inactive member activity', 'Available'\),
]

row = 6
for entry in features:
    if entry[0] == 'SECTION':
        ws.cell\(row=row, column=1, value=entry[1]\).font = section_font
        ws.cell\(row=row, column=1\).fill = section_fill
        for c in range\(2, 5\):
            ws.cell\(row=row, column=c\).fill = section_fill
        row += 1
    elif entry[0] == 'SUB':
        ws.cell\(row=row, column=1, value=entry[1]\).font = subsection_font
        for c in range\(1, 5\):
            ws.cell\(row=row, column=c\).fill = subsection_fill
        row += 1
    else:
        ws.cell\(row=row, column=1, value=entry[1]\)
        ws.cell\(row=row, column=2, value=entry[2]\)
        ws.cell\(row=row, column=3, value=entry[3]\)
        cell = ws.cell\(row=row, column=4, value=entry[4]\)
        if entry[4] == 'Available':
            cell.font = available_font
            cell.fill = available_fill
        row += 1

# Apply borders to all data cells
for r in range\(5, row\):
    for c in range\(1, 5\):
        ws.cell\(row=r, column=c\).border = thin_border
        ws.cell\(row=r, column=c\).alignment = Alignment\(wrap_text=True, vertical='top'\)

# Adjust column widths
ws.column_dimensions['A'].width = 35
ws.column_dimensions['B'].width = 40
ws.column_dimensions['C'].width = 55
ws.column_dimensions['D'].width = 15

wb.save\('planning.xlsx'\)
print\(f'Done! Wrote {row - 6} rows of features.'\)
")
